retrieved_result: How do I get digital satellite? How do I get digital satellite? Share Facebook Twitter In order to watch digital satellite TV, you’ll need a dish to receive digital signals, a set-top box that can tune in and decode the signal, and a TV that can receive and display the signals from the box. You will also need to pay a subscription
